title: Complete 1:1 Go Port - All Remaining Modules

stories.title: OAuth PKCE Login Flow + Keychain Storage
acceptanceCriteria: pkg/auth/oauth.go implements PKCE code challenge generation (S256)
pkg/auth/oauth.go implements local HTTP callback server on random port
pkg/auth/oauth.go opens browser to authorization URL with PKCE params
pkg/auth/oauth.go exchanges auth code for tokens via POST
pkg/auth/oauth.go implements token refresh flow
pkg/auth/keychain.go stores/retrieves API keys and OAuth tokens via macOS security CLI
pkg/auth/keychain.go falls back to plaintext file storage on non-macOS
pkg/auth/auth.go implements GetAPIKey chain: env var -> keychain -> config file -> prompt login
go build ./... succeeds

stories.title: Login/Logout Commands + Trust Dialog
acceptanceCriteria: pkg/commands/login.go implements /login command that triggers OAuth flow
pkg/commands/logout.go implements /logout that clears stored tokens
pkg/auth/trust.go implements first-run trust dialog checking hasAcceptedTrustDialog in config
pkg/auth/onboarding.go implements first-run onboarding flow (welcome message, accept terms)
go build ./... succeeds

stories.title: Session Persistence + Resume
acceptanceCriteria: pkg/services/sessions/sessions.go saves conversations to ~/.claude/conversations/<id>.json
pkg/services/sessions/sessions.go loads previous conversations by ID
pkg/services/sessions/sessions.go lists recent sessions with metadata
pkg/commands/resume.go implements /resume command to continue a previous session
pkg/commands/session.go implements /session command to show current session info
go build ./... succeeds

stories.title: Full System Prompt Builder
acceptanceCriteria: pkg/context/systemprompt.go builds the complete system prompt matching old-src/utils/systemPrompt.ts
System prompt includes: identity, environment info, tool descriptions, CLAUDE.md content, git status
pkg/context/systemprompt.go uses cache_control ephemeral blocks for prompt caching
Tool descriptions are dynamically generated from registered tools' Prompt() methods
go build ./... succeeds

stories.title: Remaining TS Modules: hooks UI, screens, keybindings, vim
acceptanceCriteria: pkg/hooks/ui.go implements React-hook equivalents as Go callbacks for UI state (useTerminalSize, useInput, etc.)
pkg/tui/screens.go implements screen routing (chat, settings, resume chooser)
pkg/tui/keybindings.go implements configurable keybindings from ~/.claude/keybindings.json
pkg/tui/vim.go implements vim mode with motions, operators, text objects
go build ./... succeeds

stories.title: Remaining TS Modules: bridge, components, services
acceptanceCriteria: pkg/services/bridge/session.go implements full remote session bridge with WebSocket transport
pkg/tui/components/ has Go equivalents for key UI components (message view, spinner, permission dialog, input box)
pkg/services/api/ implements the full API layer (withRetry, errors, bootstrap, rate limiting)
pkg/services/compact/autocompact.go implements automatic compaction with token threshold detection
go build ./... succeeds

stories.title: Remaining TS Modules: constants, entrypoints, skills, memdir, migrations
acceptanceCriteria: pkg/constants/ has all constant files matching old-src/constants/ (oauth, product, messages, betas, keys, xml, toolLimits, apiLimits, system)
pkg/entrypoints/ has SDK, print, headless, MCP entrypoint implementations
pkg/skills/ implements built-in skill loading and execution from .claude/skills/
pkg/memdir/ implements memory directory (auto-memory) management
pkg/migrations/ implements data migration framework
go build ./... succeeds

stories.title: Wire Everything Together + End-to-End Test
acceptanceCriteria: cmd/claude-go/main.go wires auth flow: checks keychain -> env var -> prompts login on first run
Binary starts with no API key and shows login prompt instead of error
All go test ./... pass
go vet ./... reports zero issues
Binary size remains <15MB
find old-src/ -maxdepth 1 -type d shows every directory has a Go pkg counterpart
